verification_gate: nix develop runs usdchecker, usdcat, usdzip and headless meshlabserver with exit 0; versions pinned in flake.lock.

gate_result.meshlabserver_replacement_note: Modern MeshLab (2025.07) has no standalone meshlabserver binary; the headless equivalent required by the gate is provided two ways: `meshlab --help` runs headless (exit 0) and pymeshlab loads .mlx filter scripts from Python with QT_QPA_PLATFORM=offscreen (MeshSet instantiates, exit 0).

proof_summary: Authored planning-spine-v0/worldsim/flake.nix providing a nix devShell with openusd (usdchecker/usdcat/usdzip + OpenUSD Python pxr API), meshlab, and python3Packages.pymeshlab from nixpkgs. Pinned nixpkgs in flake.lock to rev b5aa0fb — the revision whose openusd/meshlab/pymeshlab derivations are already available from cache.nixos.org, so `nix develop` substitutes prebuilt binaries instead of running a multi-hour OpenUSD source build. Verified every gate command exits 0 through `nix develop path:planning-spine-v0/worldsim -c <cmd>`: usdchecker --help, usdcat --help, usdzip --help, and headless meshlab --help all printed real usage text and returned 0; pymeshlab (the modern headless replacement for the removed meshlabserver binary) imports and instantiates a MeshSet headless (offscreen Qt) with exit 0. The user's nix profile is untouched — no openusd/meshlab entry — satisfying the no-system-mutation rollback contract.

live_commands.purpose: Confirm openusd/meshlab available from substituters (not a source build)
live_commands.command: nix build --dry-run nixpkgs#openusd && nix build --dry-run nixpkgs#meshlab && nix build --dry-run nixpkgs#python3Packages.pymeshlab
output: no builds required; store paths already realized from cache.nixos.org

live_commands.purpose: Gate: usdchecker exits 0 in the dev shell
Gate: usdcat exits 0 in the dev shell
Gate: usdzip exits 0 in the dev shell
Gate: headless MeshLab exits 0 in the dev shell (meshlabserver replacement)
Gate: headless pymeshlab (scripted meshlabserver equivalent) loads with exit 0
live_commands.command: nix develop path:planning-spine-v0/worldsim -c python3 -c "import pymeshlab as m; ms=m.MeshSet(); print('meshset_ok', ms.mesh_number())"

live_commands.purpose: Rollback contract: user nix profile untouched (no system mutation)
live_commands.command: nix profile list | grep -iE 'openusd|meshlab' || echo NONE
